summary: Issue #414 adds typed packages/ui feedback, navigation, and chart compositions with theme-token styling, Vietnamese copy, a11y contracts (aria-live, reduced-motion, keyboard/focus-visible, sr-only chart equivalents), and Vitest + import-boundary coverage. Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass. No CRITICAL reliability, security, or client-component gaps for UI-only scope.

criticalFindings.description: [intent-review] Duplicated Code: MetricSparkline, TrendAreaChart, TrendLineChart, and ChartExpandableTile each repeat the same ChartTextEquivalent + aria-hidden visual wrapper pattern.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Extract a shared ChartVisualWithEquivalent helper in a follow-up refactor if more chart variants are added.

criticalFindings.description: [intent-review] Middle Man: activateChartTile Enter/Space handler on a native <button> duplicates built-in keyboard activation.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Remove redundant keydown handler; native button already activates on Enter/Space.

criticalFindings.description: [intent-review] packages/ui/MODULE.md append-only barrel pattern: #414-A and #414-B export blocks appended without reordering #397/#412 exports.
[intent-review] #412 Vitest CSS contract pattern: composition tests use loadUiStyles() token/reduced-motion assertions consistent with prior ui package tests.

interfaceChanges.interface: Toast, ToastViewport, LoadingSpinner, LoadingSkeleton, LoadingIndicator, isNavTabActive, PageHeader, MetricSparkline, TrendAreaChart, TrendLineChart, ChartExpandableTile, ChartTextEquivalent, CHART_SERIES_COLORS
interfaceChanges.description: Adds typed feedback, navigation, and chart compositions with theme CSS variable series colors, Vietnamese defaults, and a11y contracts.
Refines active-route indication via shared isNavTabActive without changing public props.
Import-boundary proof that demo can consume all #414 @juli/ui exports.

mappings.criterion: Each composition exists as a typed packages/ui export, built from #412's elements (no duplicated primitive logic)
Toasts and loading indicators respect prefers-reduced-motion and are announced via an accessible live region
mappings.test: packages/ui/src/__tests__/loading-indicator.test.tsx::announces loading state through a live region with Vietnamese copy

mappings.criterion: Charts use Recharts, series colors from packages/theme CSS variables, keyboard-accessible, with a text equivalent for screen readers
mappings.test: packages/ui/src/__tests__/chart.test.tsx::renders a Recharts sparkline with an accessible text equivalent

mappings.criterion: Navigation is keyboard-operable with a visible focus-visible state and correct active-route indication
Vietnamese copy where the composition renders text
mappings.test: packages/ui/src/__tests__/toast.test.tsx::renders Vietnamese success copy with polite aria-live

mappings.criterion: Import-boundary tests confirm these compositions are importable by apps/demo and do not import from any apps/*
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/ui-feedback-nav.test.ts::imports feedback, navigation, and chart exports from the shared package

recommendations: Extract shared ChartVisualWithEquivalent wrapper to reduce chart.tsx duplication (intent-review smell; non-blocking).
Plan recharts v3 migration when upstream deprecation guidance stabilizes (implementation risk note).

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review passed; Guardrails found no CRITICAL reliability, security, or a11y gaps for UI library scope. Non-blocking intent-review smells recorded as INFO.

ownerSignoff.statement: AC coverage mapped; packages/ui 49 tests and demo import-boundary proof verified.

reviewBasis: working tree at fixed point 8c707cc7e8bb83cc42988343cbdf31944ef78c14 plus uncommitted #414 compositions
